refute_by: a rendered-CSS contrast measurement over the rendered button measures below the claimed WCAG threshold
rendered_css: .btn-carbon-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 6px; border: 0; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 0px; min-height: 48px; padding: 12px 64px 12px 16px; background: #0f62fe; color: #ffffff; font: 600 17px/1.2 'IBM Plex Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; transition: all 70ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0.38, 0.9); }
